## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on Q1 2025 strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** On track to match/exceed last month's traffic. The "Humanity's Last Exam" article remains a top performer, though the reason is unclear.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategy:** A major push on "Eval Engineering" will launch a course, an agent evaluation survey, and a potential platform rebrand.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize deep-dive content on "Evaluation Engineering" and "Observability" to support the Q1 strategy and boost the latter's volatile traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**New Video Initiative:** "Galileo Studios" will launch a new technical YouTube channel, aiming for 2–3 videos/week to replace the "Change of Thought" brand.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Monthly Traffic:** On track to match or exceed last month's performance.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Top Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - ["Test AI agents" & "AI evaluations" (pillar pages)](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - ["Humanity's last exam" (top performer for months; no clear external driver)](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Evaluation:** Strongest performer.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Observability:** Volatile traffic (80 sessions last week); needs a push to reach the 100-session goal.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis (Semrush):**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Arise:** Losing keywords (870 → 3828).](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Galileo:** Stable keyword performance.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Brain Trust:** Closing the gap (Galileo: 19% vs. BT: 20%).](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Q1 2025 Strategic Priorities

  - [**"Eval Engineering" Initiative:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish a new category for Galileo's platform.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Assets:** A course, an industry survey, and short-form gated content (Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Survey Focus:** Agent adoption, evaluation practices, and production challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Platform Rebrand:** Potential product name change. Galileo is advocating for a sub-topic focus instead to protect organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**Product Launches:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Agent Protect / Agent Control:** Relaunch of the "Protect" feature for agent guardrails and runtime protection.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Luna Self-Serve:** Launch pushed to January.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Complex Agent Evaluations:** Planned for February.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content & Team Updates

  - [**Content Production:** 7 articles on track for delivery this week.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [**"Light Evals" Refresh:** Updating keywords across the blog; completion expected in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Reporting Change:** Consolidate all evaluation-related prompts (LLM, agent, GenAI) into a single "AI evals" bucket for simplified reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Team Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Vivek:** Interim Head of Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Connor's Role:** Backfill proposal is for a community-focused DevRel (video/social).](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Hiring:** Actively interviewing for a permanent Head of Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Consolidate evaluation prompts in reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Continue deep-dive content on "Eval Engineering" and "Observability."](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**Galileo:**](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Provide updates on the "Eval Engineering" campaign after the marketing team meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/MdxUZxsuwGYEiJPWoJLi3aNkQMGdYbZ3?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
